'''Andrew Chaikin''' has provided the voices for several ''Star Wars'' video games.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Works==
===Gameography===
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' - ''Guk Yorba'', [[Harro Ruuk]]
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' - Unknown
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' - [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Hobbie]], Commander 6, [[Windy Starkiller|Windy]]
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' - Additional voices
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' - [[01/425]], [[RC-1140/Legends|RC-1140]]
*''[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)]]'' - [[Cody/Legends|Commander Cody]], [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], [[OOM command battle droid]]
*''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' - [[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone trooper's]], [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper's]], [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]
